data.title: Poland's Central Bank Updates GDP Growth Forecasts for 2026 and 2027
data.description: Poland's central bank has revised its GDP growth forecasts for the coming years. According to Jin10, the bank now anticipates the GDP growth rate for 2026 to be between 3.1% and 4.7%, an increase from the previous forecast of 2.7% to 4.6% made in November. For 2027, the growth rate is expected to range from 2.0% to 3.8%, compared to the earlier prediction of 1.5% to 3.7%.

data.title: Poland's Central Bank Reports Recent Global Energy Price Increase
data.description: Poland's central bank has observed a recent rise in global energy prices. According to Jin10, this development comes amid ongoing fluctuations in the energy market, impacting various sectors worldwide. The increase in energy costs is a significant factor influencing economic conditions, with potential implications for inflation and monetary policy decisions. The central bank's report highlights the need for careful monitoring of energy price trends as they continue to evolve.

data.title: White House Advocates for Clarity Act to Benefit Cryptocurrency
data.description: The White House is actively promoting the passage of the Clarity Act, a move seen as beneficial for the cryptocurrency sector. BitMine Chair Tom Lee posted on X, highlighting the potential positive impact on digital currencies such as Ethereum ($ETH). The Clarity Act aims to provide clearer regulatory guidelines for cryptocurrencies, which could foster innovation and growth within the industry. This legislative push is part of a broader effort to integrate digital currencies into the mainstream financial system, ensuring they are regulated effectively while encouraging technological advancement.

data.title: Bloomberg Invest Concludes with Key Industry Leaders
data.description: Bloomberg posted on X that the Bloomberg Invest event has concluded, featuring insights from prominent industry leaders. The event included discussions with Dilhan Pillay Sandrasegara from Temasek, Yie-Hsin from State Street Global Advisors, and representatives from Apollo Global Management. These leaders shared their perspectives on current market trends and investment strategies, providing valuable insights into the financial landscape. The event highlighted the importance of adapting to changing economic conditions and the role of innovation in driving growth. Participants emphasized the need for strategic planning and collaboration to navigate the complexities of the global market.

data.title: U.S. Non-Manufacturing Prices Index Declines in February
data.description: The U.S. non-manufacturing prices index fell to 63 in February, down from the previous value of 66.6. According to Jin10, this decrease indicates a potential easing in price pressures within the non-manufacturing sector. The index, which measures price changes in the services sector, is closely watched by economists and policymakers as an indicator of inflation trends. The decline may suggest a shift in market dynamics, impacting future economic forecasts and monetary policy decisions. Analysts will be monitoring upcoming data releases to assess the broader implications for the U.S. economy.

data.title: Binance.US launches NPCs
data.description: Binance.US has announced the listing of NPC, and the NPC/USDT trading pair is now open for trading.

data.title: U.S. Non-Manufacturing New Orders Index Rises in February
data.description: The U.S. non-manufacturing new orders index increased to 58.6 in February, up from the previous value of 53.1. According to Jin10, this rise indicates a strengthening in the non-manufacturing sector, reflecting increased demand and economic activity. The index, which measures new orders in the service sector, suggests a positive outlook for the U.S. economy as businesses experience growth in new orders. This development is seen as a sign of economic resilience amid ongoing challenges in the global market.

data.title: RedStone has deployed price oracles on the Stellar network.
data.description: Following a $10 million oracle vulnerability attack, oracle service provider RedStone announced the deployment of a price oracle on the Stellar network. This deployment aims to enhance the security and functionality of the Stellar ecosystem while providing developers with a reliable source of price information. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Grayscale transferred over $37 million worth of BTC and ETH to Coinbase.
data.description: According to Arkham, Grayscale has just transferred a total of $37.21 million worth of BTC and ETH to a Coinbase Prime address, including 3,462 ETH ($7.29 million) and approximately 413 BTC ($29.92 million).

data.title: The final reading of the US S&P Global Services PMI for February was 51.7, below the expected 52.3.
data.description: The final reading of the US S&P Global Services PMI for February was 51.7, below the expected 52.3 and the previous reading of 52.3. (Jinshi)

data.title: Barclays Warns of Potential Grid Bottlenecks Impacting Renewable Energy Projects
data.description:
Barclays has issued a warning regarding potential grid bottlenecks that could lead to stalled renewable energy installations. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting concerns that these bottlenecks might result in 'zombie' projects, where renewable energy installations are completed but unable to connect to the grid effectively.

The financial institution emphasized the importance of addressing these infrastructure challenges to ensure the successful integration of renewable energy sources into the existing power grid. The warning comes amid growing investments in renewable energy projects, which are crucial for meeting global climate goals.

Barclays' analysis suggests that without significant improvements in grid capacity and management, many renewable projects could face delays or operational inefficiencies. This situation could undermine efforts to transition to cleaner energy sources and reduce carbon emissions.

The report underscores the need for strategic planning and investment in grid infrastructure to accommodate the increasing demand for renewable energy. As countries strive to meet their climate commitments, ensuring the reliability and efficiency of power grids becomes essential.

The warning from Barclays serves as a reminder of the complexities involved in transitioning to renewable energy and the necessity of addressing infrastructure challenges to achieve sustainable energy goals.

data.title: Historic South African Wine Farm to Be Auctioned
data.description: A renowned South African wine farm, associated with a former politician and anti-apartheid activist, is scheduled for auction this month. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the significance of this event in the country's agricultural and historical landscape. The farm, known for its rich heritage and contribution to the wine industry, has attracted considerable attention from potential buyers and investors. The auction is expected to draw interest due to the property's historical value and its potential for future development. This sale marks a notable moment in South Africa's real estate and agricultural sectors, reflecting broader trends in the market.

data.title: U.S. February S&P Global Composite PMI Final Reading Falls Short of Expectations
data.description: The final reading for the U.S. S&P Global Composite PMI in February was reported at 51.9, falling short of the anticipated 52.3. According to Jin10, this figure also marks a decline from the previous value of 52.3. The PMI, which measures the economic health of the manufacturing and service sectors, indicates a slight slowdown in growth compared to expectations. This data is closely watched by investors and policymakers as it provides insights into the overall economic activity and potential future trends.

data.title: Solana Achieves Record Stablecoin Transaction Volume in February
data.description:
In February, Solana's blockchain recorded stablecoin transactions totaling $650 billion, marking a historic high and the highest level among all blockchains for the month. According to Odaily, this figure more than doubled the previous peak from October last year. A research report by Grayscale Investments, using data from Allium, attributes the surge to increased retail demand for on-chain payments, which has significantly boosted stablecoin activity. The report highlights Solana's shift from primarily meme coin transactions to SOL and stablecoin trading pairs, indicating a rise in payment use cases.

Standard Chartered previously noted that Solana's low transaction costs are aiding its expansion into micropayments and native internet financial applications. In terms of market share, Solana currently ranks as the fourth largest stablecoin supplier across all networks and is second only to Ethereum in USDC circulation. Analysts suggest that while Ethereum continues to dominate the stablecoin and real-world asset sectors, stablecoins may become a crucial pillar for the maturity of the Solana network.

data.title: Middle East Conflict May Impact Italy's Economic Growth, ING Analyst Warns
data.description: According to Jin10, Paolo Pizzoli from ING highlights in a report that the escalating Middle East conflict could negatively affect Italy's economic growth this year. In the fourth quarter of 2025, Italy's GDP grew by 0.3% quarter-on-quarter. Pizzoli states that the future growth prospects for Italy's economy will largely depend on the developments in the U.S.-Iran conflict and the broader Middle East situation, as well as their spillover effects on the energy market. He notes that Italy's reliance on energy imports is relatively high, and Italian companies are already paying higher energy prices compared to most European counterparts. The Iranian conflict and its ripple effects on the energy market could significantly slow economic growth in the first half of 2026, making the previous annual growth forecast of 0.8% appear overly optimistic.

data.title: Doppler and Hex Trust Collaborate to Expand Wrapped XRP Infrastructure
data.description: Doppler has partnered with Hex Trust to enhance the custody and yield infrastructure for Wrapped XRP. According to Foresight News, this collaboration aims to extend XRP liquidity beyond the XRP Ledger to multiple blockchain ecosystems. The initiative is expected to facilitate broader access and integration of XRP across various platforms.

data.title: Fabric Protocol (ROBO) Spot Listing Alters Alpha Trading Competition Schedule
data.description:
Binance Wallet announced on X that the Alpha trading competition will conclude earlier than initially planned due to the spot listing of Fabric Protocol (ROBO). The competition is now set to end on March 4 at 15:59 (UTC). This adjustment in schedule means that winners will be determined based on their trading volume at the time of the event's conclusion.

The rewards for the competition will be distributed on a pro-rata basis, reflecting the actual duration of the competition. Participants are encouraged to check the latest Trading Competition announcement for updated details regarding the event. This change underscores the dynamic nature of trading competitions and the need for participants to stay informed about any modifications that may arise due to new listings or other factors.

data.title: Gold and silver prices rose across the board, while cryptocurrency volatility indices fell, with both the BVIX and EVIX declining by more than 0.4% intraday.
data.description: According to the latest data from Gate, gold prices rose to $5,180.81 per ounce, a daily increase of 1.81%. Silver prices rose to $84.956 per ounce, a daily increase of 3.58%. The BVIX (BTC Volatility Index) is currently quoted at 55.09, a daily decrease of 0.58%. The EVIX (ETH Volatility Index) is currently quoted at 75.08, a daily increase of 0.47%. In the foreign exchange market, the USD/CNH exchange rate fell 0.24% to 6.89829. The USD/JPY exchange rate fell 0.23% to 157.316. In global stock indices, the Euro Stoxx 50 rose 0.73% to 5,864.39 points; the UK FTSE 100 rose 0.48% to 10,566.65 points; and the German DAX 40 rose 0.51% to 24,141.63 points. In commodities, WTI crude oil fell 0.36% to $74.62 per barrel, and Brent crude oil fell 0.32% to $82.00 per barrel. Gate allows users to directly trade traditional financial market products on its platform, providing a one-stop solution for precious metals, forex, global equity CFDs, major indices, and commodities, achieving deep integration of crypto assets and traditional financial assets. Gate TradFi features have been fully integrated into the Gate App and Web platform, allowing users to easily participate in global asset price trading without switching platforms, unlocking more strategies and opportunities outside the crypto market, and continuously enhancing their diversified asset allocation experience.

data.title: Over $75 million in margin calls were triggered across the entire network in the past hour, primarily affecting short positions.
data.description: According to Coinglass data, $75.86 million in positions were liquidated across the network in the past hour, including $73.7 million in short positions and $2.15 million in long positions. In addition, $58.4 million in BTC positions were liquidated and $8.91 million in ETH positions were liquidated.
